query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  SUM(bad_debt) as total_bad_debt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bad_debt > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rows_with_bad_debt,
  SUM(is_bad_debt_row) as bad_debt_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN payment_tx_amount ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_tx_amount
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'boonphone';
